items.title: Quadruple amputee cornhole champion facing murder charges in fatal shooting
items.dek: The YouTube community post for this one is a a lot funnier cuz they show him playing cornhole with no arms next to the headline submitted by /u/driftoboi [link]

items.title: Nearly 200 sailors serving on UK’s nuclear submarines caught doing hard drugs.

items.title: Jury orders Cosby to pay $19m to ex-waitress after finding he abused her in 1972
items.dek: Donna Motsinger alleged Cosby gave her wine and a pill that left her incapacitated after picking her up in a limousine in 1972.
items.body: Donna Motsinger alleged Cosby gave her wine and a pill that left her incapacitated after picking her up in a limousine in 1972.
items.author: IriLine Desk
